---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new option
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

<!-- What's awkward, missing, or surprising today? Concrete > abstract. -->

## Proposed change

<!-- One paragraph. If it's a new Ansible role or a new flash option, sketch
the variable/inventory shape. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional. Why this approach over the others? -->

## Affects

- [ ] Flash scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] cloud-init (`cloud-init/`)
- [ ] Ansible roles or playbooks (`ansible/`)
- [ ] CI / lint
- [ ] Docs

<!-- An ADR under `docs/decisions/` may be warranted for architectural changes. -->
